items.name: Patchwork Chore Jacket, Vest and Tuxedo Shirt
items.description: Highlighting Polo’s signature pattern play, this utilitarian-inspired chore jacket features a patchwork construction that combines plaid tweed and herringbone pieces. It’s accented by a wide-wale corduroy collar and our woven label at the left pocket. The menswear-inspired vest is carefully crafted with supple leather in a classic construction for season-spanning wear. Cut for a slim fit, it is tailored with welt pockets, slimming waist darts, and an adjustable back belt. Then, the timeless tuxedo elements, such as a pleated front bib and extended barrel cuffs, define this buttoned cotton shirt.
items.searchText: patchwork chore jacket, vest and tuxedo shirt highlighting polo’s signature pattern play, this utilitarian-inspired chore jacket features a patchwork construction that combines plaid tweed and herringbone pieces. it’s accented by a wide-wale corduroy collar and our woven label at the left pocket. the menswear-inspired vest is carefully crafted with supple leather in a classic construction for season-spanning wear. cut for a slim fit, it is tailored with welt pockets, slimming waist darts, and an adjustable back belt. then, the timeless tuxedo elements, such as a pleated front bib and extended barrel cuffs, define this buttoned cotton shirt. ralph lauren clothing jackets academia classic cowboy formal furry neko twink

items.name: Velvet Nocturne Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌘 Old-world nobility in twilight tones.
This dark red coat with black satin lapels and ornate cuffs captures the elegance of gothic romance. It commands presence — neither mortal nor mundane.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant blend of crimson velvet and dark trim
Flared cuffs for theatrical movement
Great for nobles, vampires, or bards
PBR textures highlight velvet softness and sheen
🔍 Keywords: coat, red, black, velvet, gothic, vampire, noble, elegant, formal, PBR
Style eternal — born under moonlight.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
